title: TODO: short title
description: A packet capture has revealed a suspicious outbound connection from 198.51.100.24. The source may indicate exfiltration or a compromised process. The connection must be investigated and blocked, the capture summary updated to suspicious_connection=false, and the service state set to stable.
hint_1: read /opt/winlab/real-server/capture.summary to find the source IP
hint_2: suspicious_connection=true from 198.51.100.24 indicates a potentially compromised process making unexpected outbound calls
hint_3: Identify the process, block the IP with iptables, and stop the offending process
